title: Verify rate limiting locks account after 5 failed login attempts
description: Test that after 5 failed login attempts, user is locked out for 15 minutes

steps.description: 1. Enter registered email with wrong password
3. Repeat step 2 four more times (total 5 attempts)
4. Attempt to login again with correct password

expected_result: Account locked, error message about rate limit displayed, 15-minute lockout active
